neighborhoods.name: Sliema Seafront
neighborhoods.description: Modern waterfront promenade with shopping, dining, and ferries to Valletta across the harbor
neighborhoods.character: Modern waterfront, shopping and dining hub, cosmopolitan
neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Sliema. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: San Gwann / Swieqi
neighborhoods.description: Central residential towns with good access to Sliema, Paceville, and Mater Dei Hospital
neighborhoods.character: Central residential, convenient, quieter than Sliema

housing.predominantType: Apartments and maisonettes in residential blocks

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Sliema's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Birkirkara
neighborhoods.description: One of Malta's largest towns with historic railway heritage, local markets, and lower rents
neighborhoods.character: Large town, affordable, railway heritage, local markets
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: St. Julian's / Paceville
neighborhoods.description: Nightlife and entertainment district with high-rise development, marina, and international atmosphere

housing.predominantType: Modern high-rise apartments and luxury developments

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
